LanguageData.VSIE_HadNiceChatWithBeer.stages.0.label: had a nice chat over drinks
LanguageData.VSIE_HadNiceChatWithBeer.stages.0.descri: I enjoyed the little chat and the bottle in my hand.
LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedBingeParty.stages.0.label: Attended camp blowout
LanguageData.VSIE_AttendedBingeParty.stages.0.descrip: I had a great time at the camp blowout.
